examples: The annual occupational dose limit for nuclear workers at Exelon nuclear plants is 2,000 millirem, the company said.
One employee was found to have received 16 millirem of exposure and other workers were exposed to lower levels, Exelon said.
They are suggesting that under 1 millirem per year we should consider the metal to be non-radioactive.
The DoD is suggesting that scrap that is under 1 millirem a year should not be considered radioactive scrap.
